title: Addie's T.A.R.D.I.M
description: This adds the tardis (from doctor who) into minecraft via a datapack and resourcepack
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22b10a60bfb367ead1c60508434b10d9e53de96c.png)
*****
This datapack is not related to the original TARDIM map(s)
**********

### What does this datapack do?

This adds the tardis to Minecraft by building on vanilla aspects, this doesnt follow the Doctor Who lore 100% but takes from bits here and there.

- For Vanilla / All Mod Loaders 1.21.3 ONLY!

- Recommended to play with on singleplayer as mulitplayer may not 100% work yet!

*****

### Credits

- Addie: Lead Dev

- [MakeTendo](https://www.youtube.com/@Maketendo): Logo (background)
